Description: Oil price rise: SHAP=-0.0540 for importers, -0.0525 for exporters
Policy implication: Energy importers face transition risk from oil shocks; exporters may be buffered

Description: Transition risk increases non-linearly above debt/GDP thresholds
Countries with same debt/GDP but different composition face different transition risks
Policy implication: Debt sustainability analysis should account for FX share and maturity structure
